LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR VINCENT ARROYO'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART. DEFENDANT HAS ESTABLISHED ALL BUT $100 PER MONTH IS NEEDED FOR HIS SUPPORT. $100 PER MONTH SHALL BE WITHHELD FROM DEFENDANT'S WAGES. COURT SHALL PREPARE THE ORDER ON THE JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM. (AFTER HEARING, THE ORDER WAS SIGNED AND SERVED ON ALL PARTIES.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR# 5976.(302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos
Off Calendar Oct-09-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Caroline McCormick, Esq. of the Law Offices of Caroline McCormick, T:925.628.4470, appearing specially for plaintiff;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was uncontested. Defendant/Judgment Debtor Vincent Arroyo's Claim of Exemption is granted in part. Defendant has established all but $100 per month is needed for his support. $100 per month shall be withheld from Defendant's wages. Court shall prepare the Order on the judicial council form. (After hearing, the order was signed and served on all parties.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR# 5976.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2013 Off Calendar
